creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: grembo
Date: Mon Mar 27 16:53:17 UTC 2017
New revision: 437060
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/437060

Log:
  Update to 0.9.4

  This patches the sample configuration, so buildbot won't phone home by
  default.

  Also take maintainership. If interested, the original maintainer
  is welcome to take it back.

  PR:		217700
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (2 weeks)

Changes:
  head/devel/buildbot/Makefile
  head/devel/buildbot/distinfo
  head/devel/buildbot/files/
  head/devel/buildbot/files/patch-buildbot-scripts-sample.cfg
